option.name: originalContent
option.value: ## This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. #Mon Apr 06 13:36:51 COT 2026 BASE_URL_API=http\://10.0.2.2\:8080/ BASE_URL_KEYCLOAK=http\://10.0.2.2\:8085/ sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\David\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: ## This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. #Mon Apr 06 13:36:51 COT 2026 BASE_URL_API=http\://10.0.2.2\:8080/ BASE_URL_KEYCLOAK=http\://10.0.2.2\:8085/ sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\David\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk org.gradle.java.home=C\:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # Kotlin code style for this project: "official" or "obsolete": kotlin.code.style=official org.gradle.vfs.watch=false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 org.gradle.java.home=C\:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr org.gradle.java.installations.paths=C\:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # Kotlin code style for this project: "official" or "obsolete": kotlin.code.style=official org.gradle.vfs.watch=false

option.name: originalContent
option.value: ## This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. #Mon Apr 06 13:36:51 COT 2026 BASE_URL_API=http\://10.0.2.2\:8080/ BASE_URL_KEYCLOAK=http\://10.0.2.2\:8085/ sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\David\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk org.gradle.java.home=C\:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: ## This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. #Mon Apr 06 13:36:51 COT 2026 BASE_URL_API=http\://10.0.2.2\:8080/ BASE_URL_KEYCLOAK=http\://10.0.2.2\:8085/ sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\David\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk
